channel.title: 脆弱性情報の更新確認RSS
channel.description: 特定の脆弱性情報の更新情報

item.title: "Microsoft Edge Security Updates"
item.description:
"Microsoft released the latest Microsoft Edge Stable Channel (Version 146.0.3856.62) which incorporates the latest Security Updates of the Chromium project. The Chromium team reported that CVE-2026-3909 has an exploit in the wild, and this update contains a fix for it. For more information, see the Security Update Guide."
**CVE:** CVE-2026-3909 **CVSS Score:**

item.title: "Oracle Security Alert for CVE-2026-21992 - 19 March 2026"
"K12201527: Overview of Quarterly Security Notifications"
item.description:
""Security Advisory Description F5 discloses security vulnerabilities and security exposures for F5 products in Quarterly Security Notifications (QSNs). The dates of future QSNs are published in ...""
**CVE:** **CVSS Score:**

item.title: "Chromium: CVE-2026-3918 Use after free in WebMCP"
item.description:
""This CVE was assigned by Chrome. Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) ingests Chromium, which addresses this vulnerability. Please see [Google Chrome Releases](https://chromereleases.googleblog.com/2021) for more information.""
**CVE:** CVE-2026-3918 **CVSS Score:**

**CVE:** CVE-2026-3917 **CVSS Score:**

item.title: "Changes to be aware of when moving from BIND 9.16 to 9.18"
item.description:
""Maintaining our process of continuous improvement, there have been some major changes in BIND between the two currently supported ESV versions - 9.16 and 9.18. This article summarises what those changes are so that you can go into this upgrade knowing which features are likely to affect your installation and what parameters you might need to adjust. Working document This article is still under construction. We will add more detail about impacts of the changes listed as we learn about them. Maj ...""
**CVE:** **CVSS Score:**

item.title: "Microsoft Edge Security Updates"
item.description:
"Microsoft released the latest Microsoft Edge Stable Channel (Version 146.0.3856.59) which incorporates the latest Security Updates of the Chromium project. The Chromium team reported that CVE-2026-3910 has an exploit in the wild, and this update contains a fix for it. For more information, see the Security Update Guide."
**CVE:** "CVE-2026-0385" **CVSS Score:**

item.title: "Changes to be aware of in BIND 9.20"
item.description:
""Maintaining ISC's process of continuous improvement, there have been some major changes between BIND 9.18 and BIND 9.20. This article highlights the changes most likely to require changes in configuration or operator procedures. The intent is not to replace our advice that operators always pay attention to the Release Notes, but to quickly point operators to the most relevant aspects. For more information on how features are deprecated and removed, and what those terms mean, see ISC's policy for ...""
**CVE:** **CVSS Score:**

item.title: "Stable Channel Update for Desktop"
"Stork 2.4 and Kea socket permissions"
item.description:
""Summary Stork 2.4 with Kea 3.0 may have issues due to default permissions of the Kea control sockets. Fixes are planned for future release(s), but some workarounds are possible immediately. Environment Stork 2.4.0 or later Kea 3.0.0 or later Symptoms The Stork agent (stork-agent) running on a Kea server will fail to connect to the Kea API offered by the Kea daemons. The Stork server web UI will show messages about daemon communication problems, such as: Stork server reports communication pr ...""
**CVE:** **CVSS Score:**

item.title: "ISC Packages for BIND 9"
item.description:
""ISC offers binary packages for BIND 9. Versions supported Please note that we only provide packages for operating system versions currently supported. When we release a new version of BIND, we evaluate the OSes we are supporting. We add packages for newly released operating system versions as promptly as we are able and remove packages for operating system versions and BIND versions that become end-of-life Why does ISC provide BIND 9 packages? For all open source users We want to ensure BIND 9 ...""
**CVE:** **CVSS Score:**

item.title: "Vulnerability in QuFTP Service"
item.description:
""A cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability has been reported to affect QuFTP Service. If a remote attacker gains an administrator ... More""

item.title: "Chromium: CVE-2026-3935 Incorrect security UI in WebAppInstalls"
item.description:
""This CVE was assigned by Chrome. Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) ingests Chromium, which addresses this vulnerability. Please see [Google Chrome Releases](https://chromereleases.googleblog.com/2021) for more information.""
**CVE:** CVE-2026-3935 **CVSS Score:**

item.title: "Vulnerability in QVR Pro"

item.title: "Stable Channel Update for Desktop"
"Chromium: CVE-2026-4441 Use after free in Base"
item.description:
""This CVE was assigned by Chrome. Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) ingests Chromium, which addresses this vulnerability. Please see [Google Chrome Releases](https://chromereleases.googleblog.com/2026) for more information.""
